title: NoJoinLeaveMessage
description: This plugin automatically suppresses notifications when players enter or leave the server. This keeps the chat clean and free of distractions - ideal for a tidy server atmosphere!
body:
🔇 Server Join/Leave Message Blocker

This plugin ensures that no messages are displayed when players join or leave the server. It keeps the chat clean and free from unnecessary notifications—perfect for servers that maintain a professional and organized environment.

✨ Features:

  • 🔧 Suppresses all join/leave messages in the server chat.
  • ⚙️ Lightweight and highly performant—no impact on server performance.
  • 💡 Ideal for events or servers with high player activity.
  • 🔒 Easy to install and configure.

📦 Installation:

  1. Download the plugin.
  2. Add it to your /plugins folder.
  3. Restart your server and enjoy a clean chat!

🚀 Compatibility:

This plugin works with all current Minecraft versions and is fully optimized for large servers.

Feedback and Support: We welcome your suggestions and are always available to assist with any questions!
